dates.summary: Mistral shipped Mistral Medium 3.5, a 128B dense text-vision model that NVIDIA said scored 77.6% on SWE-Bench Verified, alongside remote coding agents in Vibe and a new Work mode in Le Chat. ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM for more natural, interruption-tolerant voice interaction, while OpenAI published a postmortem on GPT-5 “goblin” behavior that exposed deployment and alignment lessons relevant to frontier model operations.
